unfair_advantages: ability to ship a small product solo

opportunities.title: Marketplace-first micro-SaaS for a search-driven pain
opportunities.thesis: Borrow distribution from a marketplace such as the Chrome Web Store, Shopify App Store, or Slack App Directory by building a tiny painkiller for a single repetitive workflow.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This is the only path that partially offsets missing audience and outreach by using marketplace discovery instead of direct selling.
validation_plan: Collect 20 search terms and inspect existing listings
Read 30 low-rating competitor reviews to identify repeated complaints
Create a fake-door page or listing draft with pricing
Build only the core transformation and publish a prototype
Track impressions, installs or signups, activation, and willingness to pay
tool_specs: Chrome extension or equivalent lightweight marketplace app
Single AI-assisted transformation based on current page context or pasted text
Minimal backend API for AI calls
Basic analytics for install to activation tracking
Simple billing path or trial gating
kill_criteria: No repeated complaint pattern in competitor reviews
Cannot describe the offer as one persona, one workflow, one outcome
No traffic or interest from marketplace discovery
Prototype cannot reach usable state inside the monthly hour budget

opportunities.title: Concierge workflow to micro-SaaS
opportunities.thesis: Manually solve a narrow workflow for a niche, then productize the repeated steps into software.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: This would normally create the fastest path to insight and eventual defensibility, but it conflicts with the user's refusal to do services or direct customer work.
validation_plan: Only viable if the user relaxes the no-services rule
tool_specs: Manual workflow supported by lightweight internal tooling

opportunities.title: Asynchronous AI audit productized service
opportunities.thesis: Package one narrow deliverable and sell it asynchronously through a platform.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: It fits a junior builder who can deliver a tightly scoped outcome fast, but it still violates the user's no-services constraint.
validation_plan: Only viable if the user relaxes the no-services rule

opportunities.title: Template-plus-AI subscription for a broad persona
opportunities.thesis: Offer AI-assisted templates or workflows to a broad persona such as job seekers or freelancers.
opportunities.why_user_can_win: Low build complexity is the only real advantage; otherwise it is generic and easy to copy.
validation_plan: Reject unless a clear niche demand source appears
tool_specs: Simple template library and AI generation flow

next_actions: Acknowledge that $3000 MRR in 30 days is not realistic under the full constraint bundle
Relax at least one constraint if high-probability revenue is the real goal
If no constraints are relaxed, run a 7-day validation sprint for one marketplace-first wedge
Aim for first paying users and conversion signal, not the headline MRR target
